phrases.intent_en: Ask which court is showing the match right now
phrases.text_local: Sur quel court se joue le match en ce moment ?
phrases.pronunciation: soor kel KOOR suh ZHOOH luh MATCH ahn suh moh-MAHN
phrases.cultural_note: Roland-Garros has three main showcourts: Philippe-Chatrier (Court Central, the main stadium), Suzanne-Lenglen (second largest), and Simonne-Mathieu (the newest, with a botanical garden roof). Daily schedules are posted at the entrance and on the official app.

responses.english: The match is on the Philippe-Chatrier court right now.
responses.phonetic: luh match eh soor luh koor fee-LEEP shah-TREE-AY ahn suh moh-MAHN
responses.local: Le match est sur le court Philippe-Chatrier en ce moment.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy food and drinks inside the grounds
phrases.text_local: Où peut-on acheter à manger et à boire dans le stade ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo puh-TOHN ash-TAY ah mahn-ZHAY ay ah BWAR dahn luh STAHD
phrases.cultural_note: The Roland-Garros village has numerous food stands and restaurants. The iconic strawberries and cream (fraises) are a tournament tradition. The champagne stands are popular, and several celebrity chefs run pop-up restaurants during the two weeks of the tournament in late May and early June.

responses.english: The food stands are around the central court.
responses.phonetic: lay pwahn duh res-toh-rah-SYOHN sohn toh-TOOR doo koor sahn-TRAL
responses.local: Les points de restauration sont autour du court central.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for directions to the Philippe-Chatrier court
phrases.text_local: Pouvez-vous m'indiquer le chemin pour le court Philippe-Chatrier ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-VAY voo mahn-dee-KAY luh shuh-MEHN poor luh KOOR fee-LEEP shah-tree-YAY
phrases.cultural_note: Philippe-Chatrier is the historic main court, rebuilt and expanded in 2019 with a retractable roof that allows play in the rain. It holds around 15,000 spectators. This is where the men's and women's singles finals are played.

responses.english: The Philippe-Chatrier court is straight ahead, then left.
responses.phonetic: luh koor fee-LEEP shah-TREE-AY eh too drwah, pwee ah gohsh
responses.local: Le court Philippe-Chatrier est tout droit, puis à gauche.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are any ground passes available on the day
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il encore des billets journée disponibles à l'entrée ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL ahn-KOR day bee-YEH zhoor-NAY dees-poh-NEE-bluh ah lahn-TRAY
phrases.cultural_note: Ground passes (billets journée) allow access to the outer courts (Courts 6-18) without assigned seats. They are sold on a lottery basis online or occasionally at the gate. They are a great way to watch early-round matches up close without expensive court tickets.

responses.english: You need to check at the ticket office. Some are available late in the day.
responses.phonetic: eel foh vay-ree-fee-AY oh gee-SHAY. eel ahn rest par-FWAH ahn fan duh zhoor-NAY
responses.local: Il faut vérifier au guichet. Il en reste parfois en fin de journée.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a bag check or locker service
phrases.text_local: Il y a une consigne pour les sacs ?
phrases.pronunciation: eel ee ah oon kohn-SEEN-yuh poor lay sahk
phrases.cultural_note: Large bags may not be allowed into the grounds. Check the size limits before arriving.

responses.english: Yes, the bag check is at the main entrance.
responses.phonetic: wee, lah kohn-SEEN-yuh eh tah lan-TRAY pran-see-PAL
responses.local: Oui, la consigne est à l'entrée principale.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which métro station is closest to the stadium
phrases.text_local: Quelle est la station de métro la plus proche du stade ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh lah stah-SYOHN duh may-TROH lah ploo PROSH doo STAHD
phrases.cultural_note: The nearest métro station is Michel-Ange–Auteuil (Line 9 and Line 10) or Porte d'Auteuil (Line 10). During the tournament, shuttle buses run from several stations. The Bois de Boulogne and Roland-Garros are adjacent — you can walk through the park to reach the stadium.

responses.phonetic: lah stah-SYOHN port doh-TUH-ee, soor lah leen-yuh deess
responses.local: La station Porte d'Auteuil, sur la ligne dix.
